name: Blank Wallpaper
short_description: Blank Wallpaper enhances desktop aesthetics by clearing the desktop, providing a complete wallpaper view for a clearer visual experience. It is perfectly compatible with Wallpaper Engine, allowing users to fully enjoy stunning wallpapers in a clean virtual space.
detailed_description:
Make your desktop the best and best looking desktop in the world.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

It will make your computer exclusive, making it difficult for others to operate easily, protecting privacy, and is suitable for teachers, streamers, and students.

You will get the cleanest desktop in the world without needing to organize it, ideal for desktop office workers.

You will become more focused during daily gaming, office work, and entertainment, suitable for large-screen users.

You will obtain a new generation of computer operation methods that are far more convenient than ordinary ones, suitable for technical professionals.

It will make your computer a tool for showing off, far surpassing the recommendations of various desktop beautification bloggers, and is suitable for those who want to beautify their desktops.

✨ Core Advantages

🧹 One-Click Tidy-Up
Solve desktop clutter with a single click—own the world’s most organized desktop instantly.

🔒 Privacy Protection
Respects your privacy! Whether in meetings, live streams, or presentations, others can only see your active windows. Even if someone else uses your PC, they won’t be able to browse other files.

⚡ Efficient Operation
A fresh, intuitive workflow with multiple quick-launch options—faster than clicking icons directly!

🎓 Zero Learning Curve
Built-in smart logic works right out of the box—no setup needed, perfect for beginners.

🚀 Lightweight & Efficient
Tiny footprint, no strain on storage, CPU, RAM, or network. A true offline tool with zero background resource usage.

🛠️ Powerful Features

🎛️ Quick Actions

⌨️ Custom Hotkeys – Open any file or app instantly.
🖱️ Right-Click Menu – Add favorite files/apps to the context menu.


📂 Virtual Desktop Folders – Create them instantly via hotkeys (default).
🔌 One-Click Shutdown – A cool and practical shortcut (enabled by default).

⚙️ Advanced Settings

🔔 Startup Options – Auto-launch, hide on startup, or hide the desktop—customizable.
🔍 Instant File Search – Integrated "Everything" engine for quick file access (disabled by default).

🎨 Personalization

🎬 Dynamic Wallpapers – Supports video wallpapers (user-provided, disabled by default).
🖱️ Animated Cursors – Custom mouse pointers (user-provided, disabled by default).
🖼️ Wallpaper Manager – Convert dynamic wallpapers to static for easy saving.
🎭 Skins/Themes – Customize the UI to match your desktop style.

🌟 Why Choose It?

✔ Tidy – No more clutter, one-click cleanup.
✔ Secure – Privacy-first, worry-free usage.
✔ Fast – Smoother and quicker than ever.
✔ Offline – No background processes, no internet needed.

Tech that makes computing simpler and more elegant!

supported_languages: Simplified Chinese, English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Danish, Russian, Hungarian, Turkish, Japanese, Traditional Chinese, Portuguese - Portugal, Vietnamese, Arabic, Korean
